body.label: source.root.thm
body.claim:
Let $(a_n)$ be a real sequence and let $L \in \mathbb{R}$ satisfy
\[
\forall \varepsilon > 0,\;\exists N,\;\forall n \ge N,\;\exists m \ge n,\; |a_m-L|<\varepsilon.
\]
Then
\[
\liminf a_n \le L \le \limsup a_n.
\]

proof_steps.claim:
Let $(a_n)$ be a real sequence and let $L \in \mathbb{R}$ satisfy
\[

\]
Then
\[
\liminf a_n \le L \le \limsup a_n.
\]
